TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Saasik ni mamo: == Saasik ni mamo:-Tingting. Ira ko cecay romi'ad, malitemoh ako koya mato'asay a mamo , mateli ko kawkaw ato takamayan i takoyodan, licay han ako: "Mamo, tatalacowa kiso?" paca'of sa ci mamo: "Talalotok kako a mitingting, sasanga'en no mako to saasik." saan, faheka kako pakatengil a milicay: "Adihay i sa'acaay i, tayra ho kiso i lotok a mitingting, kalifotan i." paca'of sa ci mamo: "Caay ka nga'ay ko no mi'acaan, o no malengaway i pala a nisanga'an saasik ko nga'ayay kalosaasik." saan. Kafahekaan ako ko paca'of noya mato'asay a mamo, mamisanga' cingra to saasik i, oya nai malengaway i palapalaan a malengaway a tingting ato no to'asan nisanga'an ko nihaenan ningra, o pinengneng no mako, o tada mi'imeray midotoc ho cingra to no to'asan lekakawa no 'Amis ko nisatolan. Kacitingtingan a palapatan, i saka 10 folad miteka a ci po'eni, ta ciporaw tangasa 12 a folad, mangalef i piporangan a romi'ad, fangcal a nengnengen ko poraw nira, ano i 'apilis no lotok, lalan no omah, pirarakatan a pala, sakohecal sa a nengnengen itira ko kaporaw, itiya i kaporangan manga'ay a minengneng. O 'Amis a finacadan, militado to malengaway i palapalaan a iraay a tingting ko sapisanga' to kalosaasik no loma', kahemaway tatoyen, fangsis ko sanek a lomaingay, o cialafohay laloma'an makorac nira asiken. O fenek no mato'asay i 'orip. Maharateng i kaemangan ho no mako, ira aca macait ko saasik i kalimoco' no loma'. Orasaka itini i Notimolan kalokanatal a finacadan ira ko malecaday to no 'Amis a lekakawa, o cecay no saasik todongay onol no laloma'an a ina, saka ira no loma' o iraay ko ina, o cecay no saasik misolimetay to laloma'an, o cecay no saasik o sapipalahad to fenek no wawa a midimokos to loma. O roma sato, I'ayaway 'orip no 'Amis, ira aca manengneng ko saasik mateli i laeno no takar, tona mamafoti' ko tamdaw o saasik no tingting ko sapitihtih to alafoh no wa'ay, o todong pitihtih a mifahfah to karetengay no wa'ay, itiya manga'ay micomod i rihadayay a foti' no dadaya, o mirocokay to to'as no 'Amis ko tingting saasik ni mamo.
S.PHON: == saasik ni mamo~u: == saasik ni mamo~u:-tiŇčtiŇč. ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, ma…ĺit…ômo~uńß ako~u ko~uja mato~u °asaj a mamo~u , mat…ô…ĺi ko~u kawkaw ato~u takamajan i tako~ujo~u…¨~…ģan, …ĺi ¶aj ńßan ako~u: "mamo~u, tata…ĺa ¶o~uwa kiso~u?" pa ¶a °o~uf sa ¶i mamo~u: "ta…ĺa…ĺo~uto~uk kako~u a mitiŇčtiŇč, sasaŇča °…ôn no~u mako~u to~u saasik." saan, fańß…ôka kako~u pakat…ôŇči…ĺ a mi…ĺi ¶aj: "a…¨~…ģińßaj i sa °a ¶aaj i, tajra ńßo~u kiso~u i …ĺo~uto~uk a mitiŇčtiŇč, ka…ĺifo~utan i." pa ¶a °o~uf sa ¶i mamo~u: " ¶aaj ka Ňča °aj ko~u no~u mi °a ¶aan, o~u no~u ma…ĺ…ôŇčawaj i pa…ĺa a nisaŇča °an saasik ko~u Ňča °ajaj ka…ĺo~usaasik." saan. kafańß…ôkaan ako~u ko~u pa ¶a °o~uf no~uja mato~u °asaj a mamo~u, mamisaŇča ° ¶iŇčra to~u saasik i, o~uja nai ma…ĺ…ôŇčawaj i pa…ĺapa…ĺaan a ma…ĺ…ôŇčawaj a tiŇčtiŇč ato~u no~u to~u °asan nisaŇča °an ko~u nińßa…ônan niŇčra, o~u pin…ôŇčn…ôŇč no~u mako~u, o~u ta…¨~…ģa mi °im…ôraj mi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶ ńßo~u ¶iŇčra to~u no~u to~u °asan …ĺ…ôkakawa no~u °amis ko~u nisato~u…ĺan. ka ¶itiŇčtiŇčan a pa…ĺapatan, i saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ mit…ôka a ¶i po~u °…ôni, ta ¶ipo~uraw taŇčasa ** a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, maŇča…ĺ…ôf i pipo~uraŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, faŇč ¶a…ĺ a n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn ko~u po~uraw nira, ano~u i °api…ĺis no~u …ĺo~uto~uk, …ĺa…ĺan no~u o~umańß, pirarakatan a pa…ĺa, sako~uńß…ô ¶a…ĺ sa a n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn itira ko~u kapo~uraw, itija i kapo~uraŇčan maŇča °aj a min…ôŇčn…ôŇč. o~u °amis a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, mi…ĺita…¨~…ģo~u to~u ma…ĺ…ôŇčawaj i pa…ĺapa…ĺaan a iraaj a tiŇčtiŇč ko~u sapisaŇča ° to~u ka…ĺo~usaasik no~u …ĺo~uma °, kańß…ômawaj tato~uj…ôn, faŇčsis ko~u san…ôk a …ĺo~umaiŇčaj, o~u ¶ia…ĺafo~uńßaj …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an mako~ura ¶ nira asik…ôn. o~u f…ôn…ôk no~u mato~u °asaj i °o~urip. mańßarat…ôŇč i ka…ômaŇčan ńßo~u no~u mako~u, ira a ¶a ma ¶ait ko~u saasik i ka…ĺimo~u ¶o~u ° no~u …ĺo~uma °. o~urasaka itini i no~utimo~u…ĺan ka…ĺo~ukanata…ĺ a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan ira ko~u ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģaj to~u no~u °amis a …ĺ…ôkakawa, o~u ¶…ô ¶aj no~u saasik to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj o~uno~u…ĺ no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an a ina, saka ira no~u …ĺo~uma ° o~u iraaj ko~u ina, o~u ¶…ô ¶aj no~u saasik miso~u…ĺim…ôtaj to~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an, o~u ¶…ô ¶aj no~u saasik o~u sapipa…ĺańßa…¨~…ģ to~u f…ôn…ôk no~u wawa a mi…¨~…ģimo~uko~us to~u …ĺo~uma. o~u ro~uma sato~u, i °ajawaj °o~urip no~u °amis, ira a ¶a man…ôŇčn…ôŇč ko~u saasik mat…ô…ĺi i …ĺa…ôno~u no~u takar, to~una mamafo~uti ° ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw o~u saasik no~u tiŇčtiŇč ko~u sapitińßtińß to~u a…ĺafo~uńß no~u wa °aj, o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč pitińßtińß a mifańßfańß to~u kar…ôt…ôŇčaj no~u wa °aj, itija maŇča °aj mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ i rińßa…¨~…ģajaj a fo~uti ° no~u …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaja, o~u miro~u ¶o~ukaj to~u to~u °as no~u °amis ko~u tiŇčtiŇč saasik ni mamo~u.
S.FORM: == Saasik ni mamo: == Saasik ni mamo:-Tingting. Ira ko cecay romi'ad, malitemoh ako koya mato'asay a mamo , mateli ko kawkaw ato takamayan i takoyodan, licay han ako: "Mamo, tatalacowa kiso?" paca'of sa ci mamo: "Talalotok kako a mitingting, sasanga'en no mako to saasik." saan, faheka kako pakatengil a milicay: "Adihay i sa'acaay i, tayra ho kiso i lotok a mitingting, kalifotan i." paca'of sa ci mamo: "Caay ka nga'ay ko no mi'acaan, o no malengaway i pala a nisanga'an saasik ko nga'ayay kalosaasik." saan. Kafahekaan ako ko paca'of noya mato'asay a mamo, mamisanga' cingra to saasik i, oya nai malengaway i palapalaan a malengaway a tingting ato no to'asan nisanga'an ko nihaenan ningra, o pinengneng no mako, o tada mi'imeray midotoc ho cingra to no to'asan lekakawa no 'Amis ko nisatolan. Kacitingtingan a palapatan, i saka 10 folad miteka a ci po'eni, ta ciporaw tangasa 12 a folad, mangalef i piporangan a romi'ad, fangcal a nengnengen ko poraw nira, ano i 'apilis no lotok, lalan no omah, pirarakatan a pala, sakohecal sa a nengnengen itira ko kaporaw, itiya i kaporangan manga'ay a minengneng. O 'Amis a finacadan, militado to malengaway i palapalaan a iraay a tingting ko sapisanga' to kalosaasik no loma', kahemaway tatoyen, fangsis ko sanek a lomaingay, o cialafohay laloma'an makorac nira asiken. O fenek no mato'asay i 'orip. Maharateng i kaemangan ho no mako, ira aca macait ko saasik i kalimoco' no loma'. Orasaka itini i Notimolan kalokanatal a finacadan ira ko malecaday to no 'Amis a lekakawa, o cecay no saasik todongay onol no laloma'an a ina, saka ira no loma' o iraay ko ina, o cecay no saasik misolimetay to laloma'an, o cecay no saasik o sapipalahad to fenek no wawa a midimokos to loma. O roma sato, I'ayaway 'orip no 'Amis, ira aca manengneng ko saasik mateli i laeno no takar, tona mamafoti' ko tamdaw o saasik no tingting ko sapitihtih to alafoh no wa'ay, o todong pitihtih a mifahfah to karetengay no wa'ay, itiya manga'ay micomod i rihadayay a foti' no dadaya, o mirocokay to to'as no 'Amis ko tingting saasik ni mamo.

kapo~uraw, itija i kapo~uraŇčan maŇča °aj a min…ôŇčn…ôŇč. o~u °amis a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, mi…ĺita…¨~…ģo~u to~u ma…ĺ…ôŇčawaj i pa…ĺapa…ĺaan a iraaj a tiŇčtiŇč ko~u sapisaŇča ° to~u ka…ĺo~usaasik no~u ńßo~u no~u mako~u, ira a ¶a ma ¶ait ko~u saasik i ka…ĺimo~u ¶o~u ° no~u …ĺo~uma °. o~urasaka itini i no~utimo~u…ĺan ka…ĺo~ukanata…ĺ a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan ira ko~u ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģaj to~u no~u °amis a ¶…ô ¶aj no~u saasik o~u sapipa…ĺańßa…¨~…ģ to~u f…ôn…ôk no~u wawa a mi…¨~…ģimo~uko~us to~u …ĺo~uma. o~u ro~uma sato~u, i °ajawaj °o~urip no~u °amis, ira a ¶a man…ôŇčn…ôŇč ko~u saasik mat…ô…ĺi i …ĺa…ôno~u no~u takar, to~una mamafo~uti ° ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw o~u saasik no~u tiŇčtiŇč ko~u sapitińßtińß to~u a…ĺafo~uńß no~u wa °aj, o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč pitińßtińß a mifańßfańß to~u kar…ôt…ôŇčaj no~u wa °aj, itija maŇča °aj mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ i rińßa…¨~…ģajaj a fo~uti ° no~u …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaja, o~u miro~u ¶o~ukaj to~u to~u °as no~u °amis ko~u tiŇčtiŇč saasik ni mamo~u.
